title: Frontend — API client with auth token management
description: Create a typed Axios instance that automatically attaches the JWT from localStorage to all requests and handles 401 responses by redirecting to login.
acceptanceCriteria: All API requests include Authorization: Bearer <token> header when token exists
Token is read from localStorage key 'auth_token'
401 responses automatically clear the token and redirect to /login
API client is typed with TypeScript for all request/response types

steps.details: Create src/web/src/lib/api.ts. Create an Axios instance: const api = axios.create({ baseURL: 'http://localhost:8000' }). Add a request interceptor: before each request, get token from localStorage.getItem('auth_token'), if token exists set config.headers.Authorization = 'Bearer ' + token. Add a response interceptor: on 401 error, call localStorage.removeItem('auth_token') and window.location.href = '/login'.

steps.description: Define TypeScript types for API responses
steps.details: Create src/web/src/types/api.ts. Define interfaces: User { id: string; email: string; name: string; weight_unit: 'lbs' | 'kg' }, AuthResponse { access_token: string; token_type: string; user: User }, WeightEntry { id: string; weight_value: number; recorded_at: string; created_at: string }, PaginatedWeightResponse { entries: WeightEntry[]; total: number; page: number; page_size: number; total_pages: number }.

Create src/web/src/lib/apiService.ts. Export functions: login(email, password) -> Promise<AuthResponse>, register(name, email, password) -> Promise<AuthResponse>, getMe() -> Promise<User>, getWeightEntries(params: {page, time_filter}) -> Promise<PaginatedWeightResponse>, createWeightEntry(weight_value) -> Promise<WeightEntry>, updateWeightEntry(id, weight_value) -> Promise<WeightEntry>, deleteWeightEntry(id) -> Promise<void>, updateProfile(data) -> Promise<User>, updatePassword(current, new) -> Promise<void>, updatePreferences(weight_unit) -> Promise<User>, deleteAccount() -> Promise<void>.

technicalNotes: The 401 interceptor provides automatic logout when token expires
Use import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL for the base URL to allow environment-specific configuration
